rationale: OSS edition confirmed — all changed files are under web/src/ with no enterprise path prefixes. The diff adds a new routed, navigable UI page at /test-demo (TestDemo.vue) with deterministic interactive controls (fruit select, cascading country→city selects, basic/advanced mode toggle, conditional priority select, and a combined-rule banner). All interactive elements carry data-test attributes. No REST endpoints or API contract changes. The page is a standalone test-surface, best placed in the GeneralTests area alongside other cross-cutting specs. No explicit opt-out found in feature_hint.txt or trigger_comment.txt. E2E generation is warranted; the downstream Architect should generate a self-contained Playwright spec exercising all four interactive sections.
